message:
perf: add #[inline] to obligation_table, waker, task_handle, and arena accessors

Sweep 5 continued: ObligationTable had only 2 inline annotations despite
being on the lock ordering critical path. Added inline to get/get_mut/
remove/len/is_empty. Also covered WakerState::new/drain_woken,
TaskHandle::join/try_join, and Arena::len/is_empty.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
